title: Embroidery Samples *stitched*
excerpt: Hi! I'm currently out of town working on something pretty big that will be announced in December. I've had several requests asking to see the newest embroidery stencil kit in the Stitched collection. Here's Oxford in action.Supplies: Oxford stencil kit…
body: Hi! I'm currently out of town working on something pretty big that will be announced in December. I've had several requests asking to see the newest embroidery stencil kit in the Stitched collection. Here's Oxford in action.Supplies: Oxford stencil kit |  American Crafts Mini Stapler | papers, stickers and embellishments from the Stitched collection I'm nuts about seeing your work using our products, please link up any projects you have made using Stitched in the comments!
